content: User preference: smart cards > drill-down lists. One universal element type (SmartMetricCard + DrillPieChart pair). See design_smart_cards_system.md, methodology_drill_10of10.md
Apple-style filter UX: tiered (year/period/month pills, org tree, methods/activities/budgets multi-select). Empty=Все=no filter. Immediate (no Apply button).

name: f4-dashboard-kickoff
description: S4 plan: 1) KBTooltip component first (blocker), 2) STANDARD_METRICS registry with formula/source/thresholds/law per metric, 3) Remove DeptCards/CalendarHeatmap/TrustGauge (replaced by RatingTable adaptive + binary KPI), 4) Hero 5 KPI with deltas (exec_count_pct/execution_pct/critical_issues/economy_rate/trust_binary), 5) Adaptive RatingTable showing подведы when ГРБС selected + sparkline + ФБ column. Apply ag-apple-platform-design-hig-* + ag-data-analytics-claude-d3js-skill + persona scoring.
